title: Kibbeh
instructions: Mix bulgur with meat and spices.
Make filling with meat, onions, nuts.

reviews.text: Perfect kibbeh! Added a splash of lemon juice and a pinch of sumac. Also added a dash of allspice and a sprinkle of fresh mint.
Baked instead of fried for a lighter version. Added extra pine nuts and a pinch of cumin. Served with tahini sauce.
Perfect recipe! Followed it exactly and turned out great. Will make again.
Really good recipe. My family loved it. Simple to follow.
It was okay. Nothing special but edible. Might make again with changes.
Didn't work for me. Flavor was off and texture was wrong.
